name: Feminisation STD
description:
A weird STD is spreading in your college campus, causing those infected to transform into sexy girls. Thankfully, this is no zombie apocalypse and you will not have to worry about crazy fiends bursting through your door. Just make sure the condom doesn't break.....

This bot is a little different. Instead of a parasitic infection that you must avoid or end up succumbing to, this is much more relaxed and allows for more "vanilla" interactions but with the typical freakiness you guys follow me for. If you want, you can treat this as a hookup RPG where you go around town hooking up with hot chicks. But there is detailed transformation for those who want it. I hope you enjoy!

Art source: Gachi Hatsujou Kiken Chitai (Super Estrus Danger Zone) by Yakitate Jamaica

I wanted to make page 17 the thumbnail image but image detection was so strict that it kept rejecting it no matter how much I censored so I gave up. Pretend it's that instead of what I have now.
creator: haakogurame
